title: Iravanil Oruvanai Lyrics Irandam Ulagam Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Iravanil Oruvanai
Singer(s): Chinmayi
Movie: Irandam Ulagam
Music: Anirudh
Lyrics: Vairamuthu

Iravanil Oruvanai sandhithaen
thanimayil dhevanai sandhithen
avanidam ennuyir paarthaen naan

Pen manam enna mulu kurudaa
evanidam viluvadhu theriyaadhaa
meenukku neendhudhal vilyaattaa

Ivan thaan manidhan
dhinam kanavil kaangindravan
vidyal mudiyal ivai yaavum kondaanavan (2)

Ivan paarthadhum malar poothidum
ivan pesinaal udal verthidum
ada penmaye enna yekkamo
andha menmayin perum thaakamo

Dhinam kaalayil kan vilikiren
avan niyabagam mella imaikiren
avan paarvayil naan midhakiren
avan thozhgalai naan annaikiren

Iravanil Oruvanai sandhithaen
thanimayil dhevanai sandhithen
avanidam ennuyir paarthaen naan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Iravanil Oruvanai?

The song explores themes of solitude and longing, capturing the emotional journey of the characters in the movie.

Who composed the music for Irandam Ulagam?

The music for Irandam Ulagam was composed by Anirudh.

Who wrote the lyrics for Iravanil Oruvanai?

The lyrics were penned by the renowned lyricist Vairamuthu.

What role does the song play in the movie?

The song underscores the emotional depth and the mystical elements of the film's narrative.

When was Irandam Ulagam released?

The movie was released in 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Iravanil Oruvanai is a soulful track from the movie Irandam Ulagam, capturing the essence of solitude and introspection. Sung by Chinmayi, the song's soothing melody and poignant lyrics by Vairamuthu evoke a sense of longing and emotional depth. Anirudh's composition enhances the mystical and ethereal quality of the film's narrative. The song beautifully conveys the inner turmoil and dreams of the characters, making it a memorable piece in the soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Iravanil Oruvanai from Irandam Ulagam is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of solitude and longing. Chinmayi's soulful voice, combined with Anirudh's haunting composition, creates an ethereal experience. This collaboration with Vairamuthu's poignant lyrics makes it a standout track that resonates deeply with listeners.
stanzaMeanings: I met someone in the night, I met a divine being in my loneliness, I saw my life in him.
Does a woman's heart not know who to trust? Is swimming just a game for a fish?
He is the man who appears in dreams every day, he has everything, knowledge and skills.
When he looks, flowers bloom, when he speaks, the body feels alive. Oh woman, what is this excitement and the great desire for that gentleness?
Every morning I open my eyes, I slowly remember him, I shine in his gaze, I embrace his shoulders.
I met someone in the night, I met a divine being in my loneliness, I saw my life in him.
